{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162409126427270C9293F994F3"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374450754415330058","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的写作风格很独特，作者用轻松明快的语调讲述历史，还善用比喻，让我感觉就像在看一部精彩的历史剧。而且书中的很多内容都让我联想到了自己的亲朋好友，比如在竞争激烈的现代社会，我们也需要像诸侯争霸那样，有策略地去应对各种挑战。历史真的很有价值，能让我们保持清醒，还能给我们逻辑和斗志！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716883058,"group_id":"7299761779846941734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱到最终，喜欢变成了不甘，深爱变成了心酸。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8CoxGwppXy7ttqb/p2DJro=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6e29c0a43f1f48e5896590ea0d3420a5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533892&x-signature=NTJ9ORniPfDWBWOLPPcpJkbSOLs%3D","user_id":"132408494262552","user_name":"小メ情緒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"132408494262552","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7299761779846941734","book_info":{"abstract":"继《看懂世界格局的第1本书》之后，作者王伟将他特有的视角放回中国。
这本《看懂中国格局的第本书》，细数从诸侯争霸到秦帝国统一中国的历史事件，以大历史观、战略思维的角度，分析地方诸侯国之间的微妙博弈、秦统一六国以及秦帝国的建立。呈现出一部精彩绝伦的历史大戏。
本书用大开大合的笔法将复杂多变的先秦史呈现出来，并把中国放在世界大格局中，作者善用形象生动的比喻，用轻松明快的语调，使读者能够了解中国格局形成的由来以及未来的走向。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/673efe7e76bf8266590fb319bc16625e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"王伟","author_id":"","book_id":"7299761779846941734","book_name":"从诸侯到帝国","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#701010","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.5万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475656800092556312","read_count":"254","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"185492"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"40","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/673efe7e76bf8266590fb319bc16625e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179049&x-signature=LBhlT%2F8vpoiuAX9s3J0rlSFy49o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162409126427270C9293F994F3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15780,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":249},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7453032811020026686","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，有独特鲜明的观点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735301217,"group_id":"7299761779846941734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{
